blocks.text: Kristoffersen leads Norway's alpine charge in Soldeu Giant Slalom

A Norwegian winter sports double-header unfolds Friday: Kristoffersen, McGrath, and Mowinckel hunt World Cup Finals podiums in Soldeu, while Thingnes Bø tackles the gruelling 20km individual in Kontiolahti.
🏅 Biathlon World Cup — Men's 20km Individual, Kontiolahti — Bø leads Norway's assault
🏅 Paralympic Winter Games 2026 — Opening Ceremony, Milan/Cortina
